compressed_regions.summary: Multiple backward bulk-related features exhibit extremely low cardinality with unique values=1 and very low cardinality ratios, indicating near-constant values across the partition.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Avg Bulk Rate|Bwd Avg Bytes/Bulk|Bwd Avg Packets/Bulk|Bwd PSH Flags|Bwd URG Flags
notes: Backward bulk and flag features with cardinality=1

compressed_regions.summary: Forward bulk-related features similarly show extremely low cardinality with unique values=1 and minimal cardinality ratios, mirroring backward bulk features.

locality.scope_value: Fwd Avg Bulk Rate|Fwd Avg Bytes/Bulk|Fwd Avg Packets/Bulk|Fwd URG Flags

compressed_regions.summary: Multiple feature pairs exhibit near-perfect or perfect correlation (correlation ≥ 0.9993), indicating strong linear dependencies and potential redundancy.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Bwd Segment Size|Fwd Header Length|Fwd Header Length.1|Fwd PSH Flags|SYN Flag Count|Fwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Fwd Segment Size|RST Flag Count|ECE Flag Count|Total Backward Packets|Subflow Bwd Packets|Total Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Packets|Total Length of Bwd Packets|Subflow Bwd Bytes|Total Length of Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Bytes|Packet Length Mean|Average Packet Size
notes: Strongly correlated feature pairs with correlation ≥ 0.9993

compressed_regions.summary: Backward packet length features show substantial class-conditioned structural variation with high variance ratios and differing unique value counts between BENIGN and DDoS classes.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Packet Length Max|Bwd Packet Length Mean|Bwd Packet Length Std|Avg Bwd Segment Size

compressed_regions.summary: Average Packet Size shows class-conditioned structural variation with moderate variance ratio and unique value count differences between classes.

compressed_regions.summary: Partition-level overview indicates moderate class imbalance and presence of duplicated rows, which may influence structural patterns and feature distributions.
Destination Port feature shows strong distributional divergence between BENIGN and DDoS classes, with DDoS class dominated by a single port and zero entropy.

preserved_weak_signals.descriptor: CWE Flag Count shows extremely low cardinality with unique_values=1 and cardinality_ratio=1e-05.
preserved_weak_signals.preservation_reason: Low cardinality consistent with other low diversity flag features; may indicate uninformative or saturated measurement.

unresolved_tensions.description: Presence of duplicated rows may conflict with observed class-conditioned structural variation and strong feature dependencies, complicating interpretation of feature stability and redundancy.
Features with near-constant values coexist with features showing strong class-conditioned structural variation, creating tension between stable and variable feature subsets.
Strong distributional divergence in Destination Port feature may be influenced by moderate class imbalance, raising uncertainty about stability and generalizability of this signal.
